params.rule: 5-sleeve concentrated stock+ETF momentum. 70% stocks (top-3/5/7 by 6mo/12mo) + 30% ETFs (top-1 by 21d/126d). Gross == 1.0; no margin; no levered ETFs.
params.stock_universe_disclosure: Survivorship-biased (current large-caps with 2010+ data; bankrupt/delisted excluded). 3.0% CAGR haircut applied to stock portion.

params.rule: Pure long-only top-3 stock momentum, weekly rebal.
Standalone LETF strategy (no Phoenix). 40% stock top-2 weekly + 30% LETF top-2 weekly + 30% stock top-3 monthly.
